name: dmatrix_capacity_mode
_comment: d-Matrix Corsair Capacity Mode (sram.md §3.3): pin weights to LPDDR5 (the 'hbm' tier slot in the auto-materialized hierarchy from sram_*+hbm_* fields), freeing SRAM for KV cache and a larger batch / longer context. KV stays on auto-greedy so it lands on SRAM by default and only spills to LPDDR5 when the SRAM tier saturates — making this tuner a pure weights-tier toggle that works across partition shapes. Used for models too large to fit aggregate SRAM. Trades per-user TPOT for aggregate throughput / capacity, matching d-Matrix Aviator runtime's mode toggle.
